query:
-- Get all orphaned record counts in one query
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients c WHERE c.userId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users)) as orphaned_clients,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoices i WHERE i.userId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users)) as orphaned_invoices_no_user,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoices i WHERE i.contractId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM rentalContracts)) as orphaned_invoices_no_contract,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rentalContracts rc WHERE rc.userId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users)) as orphaned_contracts_no_user,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rentalContracts rc WHERE rc.vehicleId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM vehicles)) as orphaned_contracts_no_vehicle,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenanceRecords mr WHERE mr.userId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users)) as orphaned_maintenance_no_user,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenanceRecords mr WHERE mr.vehicleId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM vehicles)) as orphaned_maintenance_no_vehicle,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM damageMarks dm WHERE dm.userId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users)) as orphaned_damage_no_user,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM damageMarks dm WHERE dm.contractId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM rentalContracts)) as orphaned_damage_no_contract;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3JZ9fT9capQqaJ5.root --database 7Q8gdiHiBpSXUrkFz6JMfV --execute 
-- Get all orphaned record counts in one query
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients c WHERE c.userId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users)) as orphaned_clients,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoices i WHERE i.userId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users)) as orphaned_invoices_no_user,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoices i WHERE i.contractId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM rentalContracts)) as orphaned_invoices_no_contract,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rentalContracts rc WHERE rc.userId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users)) as orphaned_contracts_no_user,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rentalContracts rc WHERE rc.vehicleId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM vehicles)) as orphaned_contracts_no_vehicle,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenanceRecords mr WHERE mr.userId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users)) as orphaned_maintenance_no_user,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenanceRecords mr WHERE mr.vehicleId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM vehicles)) as orphaned_maintenance_no_vehicle,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM damageMarks dm WHERE dm.userId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM users)) as orphaned_damage_no_user,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM damageMarks dm WHERE dm.contractId NOT IN (SELECT id FROM rentalContracts)) as orphaned_damage_no_contract;
